version_description: I've spent the time to line-up the words with the rhythmic timing of the chords. This system makes it much easier to play / sing the song.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
This song uses a combination of power chords and bar chords depending on the part of the song.

There are 2 guitars in the recording, this version hopes to combine them into one part.

You have to listen to the song for when the guitar slides, it makes it
sound much more like the song. I tried to notate the timing as best as possible.

There's some cool licks to chuck in too.

[tab]  [Lick 1]           [Lick 2]          [Lick 3]
e|-------------|   e|-------------|  e|-------------|
B|-------------|   B|-------------|  B|-------------|
G|-------------|   G|-------------|  G|-------------|
D|-------------|   D|-------------|  D|-------------|
A|--10-10-8-6--|   A|--6-8-8/10-8-|  A|-----6-------|
E|-------------|   E|-------------|  E|-6/8---8\6-4-|[/tab]
